query:
INSERT INTO users (
  openId, name, email, loginMethod, passwordHash, emailVerified, role,
  subscriptionTier, subscriptionStatus, subscriptionEndsAt,
  onboardingComplete, onboardingStage, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn
) VALUES (
  'native_zapreviewer_zapcampaigns_com',
  'Meta Reviewer',
  'zapreviewer@zapcampaigns.com',
  'email',
  '$2b$12$jEsMJahE3gon2Y2MeV0OQOBkrgVbmclOgpjrFsogNGnzIqXTGwZ/K',
  true,
  'user',
  'pro',
  'active',
  DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 13 MONTH),
  true,
  5,
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
